title: Product Custom Field Data

id.description: The unique numeric ID of the custom field increments sequentially. Read-Only.

name.description: The name of the field, shown on the storefront, orders, etc. This field is a requirement for /POST requests.

value.description: The value of the field, shown on the storefront, orders, etc. This field is a requirement for /POST requests.

description: Gets custom fields associated with a product. These allow you to specify additional information that will appear on the product’s page, such as a book’s ISBN or a DVD’s release date.
